title: Printed form available upon request
doc_html:
§1020.6. Printed form available upon request

            The directory of network providers required pursuant to this Subpart shall be furnished in printed form to any covered person upon request.

            Acts 2018, No. 290, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2019.
doc_text:
§1020.6.  Printed form available upon request
The directory of network providers required pursuant to this Subpart shall be
furnished in printed form to any covered person upon request.
Acts 2018, No. 290, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2019.
